data.name: NEKOPARA After
data.detailed_description:
劇情簡介

貝涅對嘉祥作為糕點師的手藝表示認可之後，她覺得自己已經完成了使命。於是她關掉了法國的「La Soleil」，並把自己照顧的貓娘託付給了嘉祥。
草莓雖然對嘉祥抱有好感，面對六隻貓娘情人前輩卻有些不知所措。隨後她漸漸對同樣心藏愛意的時雨敞開了心扉。
草莓主張兄妹間的關係更重要，時雨則是認為貓娘的幸福高於一切。
想讓彼此的戀情先實現——一隻貓娘和一個女孩的攻防戰就此開始！

遊戲看點

  • 原作者Sayori繪製的精美CG
  • 片頭曲「Contrail」由Ceui演唱
  • 片尾曲「side by side」由FUWAMOCO演唱
  • 動作豐富的角色立繪栩栩如生
  • 全篇日文語音（主人公除外）
  • 支援日文、英文、繁體中文
  • 備有CG鑑賞模式

製作人員

  • 原畫、劇本原案
    Sayori
  • 劇本
    紫雪夜
  • 片頭曲
    「Contrail」
    演唱：Ceui
    作詞、作曲、編曲：Motokiyo
  • 片尾曲
    「side by side」
    演唱：FUWAMOCO
    作詞：Kris Roche
    作曲、編曲：Aiobahn +81

data.supported_languages:
英文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz and above
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Full HD 1080p 1920x1080 and above, full color support VRAM above 128MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound compatible sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.66 GHz and above
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Full HD 1080p 1920x1080 and above, full color support VRAM above 256MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound compatible sound card

data.name: NEKOPARA After
data.detailed_description:
STORY

Having recognized Minaduki Kashou’s talents in running his patissiere, Beignet felt her role was over. So she closed La Soleil in France and entrusted Fraise, the catgirl she raised, to him.

Fraise feels a fondness towards Kashou but becomes bewildered in the face of his 6 catpanions. She turns to Shigure for advice but she too harbors a hidden love for him. Fraise feels that the relationship between siblings is the most important while Shigure feels the happiness of her catgirls is what is most important.

Motivated by their desire to make sure the other is able to fulfill their love for Kashou first, the battle between catgirl and girl begins!

FEATURES

  • Beautiful artwork and designs from creator, Sayori
  • Opening theme song, "Contrail" sung by Ceui
  • Ending theme song, "side by side" sung by FUWAMOCO
  • Animated characters sprites bring the characters to life
  • Full Japanese voice acting (except for protagonist)
  • English, Traditional Chinese, Japanese text options
  • CG Gallery Mode

Staff

  • Artwork & Plot
    Sayori
  • Story
    Murasaki Yukiya
  • Opening Theme Song
    "Contrail"
    Singer: Ceui
    Lyrics & Songwriting & Arrangement: Motokiyo
  • Ending Theme Song
    "side by side"
    Singer: FUWAMOCO
    Lyrics: Kris Roche
    Composition & Arrangement: Aiobahn +81

data.short_description: A new chapter begins with the arrival of the catgirl, Fraise! She seeks advice from his little sister, Shigure and while Fraise feels the relationship between siblings is most important, Shigure priorities the happiness of her catgirls. This sets the stage in the battle between catgirl and girl!
data.supported_languages:
English, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 8 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz and above
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Full HD 1080p 1920x1080 and above, full color support VRAM above 128MB
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound compatible sound card

Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 8 or higher
  • Processor: 2.66 GHz and above
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Full HD 1080p 1920x1080 and above, full color support VRAM above 256MB
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
